map: DOCUMENTED biomes: green grass island, blue water + sand, RED LAVA, lots of WHITE/SNOW arenas, a distinctive grey CONCENTRIC-SQUARE arena (a labyrinth/grid boss arena), a colorful tiled grid, brown/orange dungeon with snow.

taunts: You are food for my minions!

mechanics: DOCUMENTED: client X3.32; vanilla MOTD ('Welcome to Realm of the Mad God') + a custom 'Have a nice break <3' line; '/help' command exists ('Type /help for more help'); WASDQE controls. A concentric-square labyrinth boss-arena layout. No new boss taunts.
